Thank you for your interest in joining MASECO

Close

Attention
We want to make you aware of recent attempts by fraudsters to impersonate members of our team and our business. Your security is extremely important to us, so please remember that MASECO Private Wealth will never contact you out of the blue, and we will never request payments or sensitive information via WhatsApp or any other social media platform.

If you ever receive a message or call that doesn’t feel quite right, we encourage you to reach out to us directly using the contact details found here: https://masecoprivatewealth.com/contact or please report any suspicious activity to: complianceteam@masecopw.com

We develop partnerships, for the long-haul

Guiding your wealth across borders and generations

For US or UK citizens living overseas, we are uniquely positioned to provide tailored services that simplify your unique multi-jurisdictional wealth needs.

Unparalleled US/UK wealth management knowledge

US/UK tax efficient investment strategies

FCA authorised and regulated, and SEC registered

US, UK and Offshore custody options

Multi-currency investment options ($,€,£)

Ability to advise on US products (529 plans, Trusts, UTMAs, IRAs etc.)

Ability to advise on UK products (SIPPs, ISAs, Offshore Bonds etc.)

Thought leadership in US/UK wealth planning

Evidence based, systematically active investment philosophy

Best of All Worlds(TM)
Throughout our journey we have listened to, and worked with, thousands of families to enable them to make choices on how they can live their best life.

We have gathered that data and experience and created a three-part program to help our families live a rich and thriving life.

We call it: Best of All Worlds(TM).

Discover more

How we invest
Our academically driven approach guides us at every point in the investment process. It enables us to focus on financial science to build strategies that emphasise factors of the market that research shows have delivered higher returns over time.

Our investment philosophy

Research
The funds we deploy apply rigorous research, leveraging academic insights and quantitative models to uncover market inefficiencies and identify robust investment opportunities.

Application
Next, we apply these insights by constructing diversified portfolios that are tailored to each clients’ specific goals and risk profiles, ensuring alignment with your long-term financial objectives.

Implementation
Finally, we focus on meticulous implementation, utilising bespoke technology and best practice to execute strategies tax-efficiently and cost-effectively. Through this disciplined and evidence-based approach, we strive to deliver consistent, superior outcomes for you and your family.

Our families
Over the past fifteen years, MASECO has reinvented the relationship between US, UK and global families and their global wealth.

US Families living in the UK

The majority of our clients pay US taxes, so our core focus is building portfolios with your distinct, complex financial needs in mind.

Globally minded US Families
Streamline your world with unparalleled investment strategies and multi-jurisdictional tax intelligence from experienced private wealth and investment managers.

UK Families living in the US
With SEC registration, MASECO stands ready to guide you and your family through the complexities of relocating to the US, with the support of our experienced wealth managers.

Globally minded UK Families

Our global network of product providers, professionals and tax efficient investments connects clients to world renowned resources.

Doing well by doing good
MASECO’s mission is to make a difference. We operate on the guiding principle that the future of wealth management is intrinsically linked to a sustainable future for all. We believe in sustainability’s potential to be a powerful driver of innovation, growth, resilience, and competitive advantage.

Learn more

Book an appointment
We believe collaboration begins with a conversation. To book your introductory conversation with a MASECO financial advisor, please click on the button below to select an available time and date using the calendar.

Book now

Insights

Contact Us

Contact Us

Client Access

Different? We’re worlds apart
MASECO was founded on the belief that great wealth management knows no borders or boundaries. As pioneers and practitioners of tailored strategies for US, UK and global families, we’re motivated not by how many assets we manage, but how many lives we enrich.

Let's start your journey today.
Book an appointment with a wealth expert.

Do you have an investable portfolio
of more than $/£1,000,000?

If so, let's talk.

Yes
No

Thank you for your interest in joining MASECO

Based on your response, our services are not the right fit for you at this time. If your circumstances change, please do get in touch.

Close

A service as unique as your needs
Our expertise comes from an unparalleled position of first-hand experience and real understanding.

Why MASECO?
We aspire to provide an exceptional service. But we are so much more than a wealth manager. We are a trusted partner, adviser, and friend to our US, UK and global client families.

Pioneering thinkers
In 2008, our founders believed that there was a better way to serve the needs of high-net worth and ultra-high net worth US families living overseas.

Today, we stand at the nexus of analytical research and immersive wealth planning - bringing vast international experience, unique investment insight and the broadest network of specialists to our US, UK and global client families’ lives.

Our history

Life Partners
Your goals guide everything we do. We understand that navigating your wealth the way you want takes more than a plan - it requires a partner. We specialise in creating deep, fiduciary relationships where our clear investment pathway and unique evidence-driven approach provides the clarity and reassurance you need to focus on the journey ahead.

UK/US focused and tailored to your distinct multi-jurisdictional needs, our powerful three-step program - Best of All Worlds(TM) - plans and maps a clear, data-driven pathway.

Best of All Worlds(TM)

Data devotees
Backed by over 15 years of multi-jurisdictional financial expertise, comprehensive quantitative and qualitative analysis drives MASECO’s methodology. Data underpins our academic approach to systematically active investing - leveraging returns while managing risk - delivering a researched, systematic approach implemented consistently across asset classes and the globe.

Our investment philosophy

We’re proud of our culture
We work with trust, transparency and openness. We believe that when your life is guided by a sound plan, you can achieve great things.

With your goals as our guide, our commitment to always do what’s right for our clients sets us apart.

Values-driven

We know that phenomenal client service and enduring success lies in having a strong culture and outstanding employees who live our values.

In a fast-moving and increasingly complex global financial landscape, our success depends on how adeptly we adapt, but equally, how faithfully we adhere to our core values. To act with integrity and responsibility at all times, while supporting the growth of our US, UK and global client families.

Best of All Worlds(TM)

Over the last fifteen years we have listened to, and worked with, thousands of families to enable them to make choices on how they can live their best life. We have gathered that data and experience and created a three-part program to help our families live a rich and thriving life.

We call it: Best of All Worlds(TM).

Doing well by doing good

MASECO’s mission is to make a difference. We operate on the guiding principle that the future of wealth management is intrinsically linked to a sustainable future for all.

We believe in sustainability’s potential to be a powerful driver of innovation, growth, resilience, and competitive advantage.

Awards and recognition*

2025

Best Wealth Management Company in the Business Awards UK 2025

Leading Financial Advisor 2025 London UK, in the M&A Today 2025 Awards

Best Cross-Border Wealth Management Company in the UK - Global Business and Finance Magazine Awards

2024

Gold in the Financial Advisory Firm of the Year category at the Magic Circle Awards

Overall Marketing Campaign category at the Citywealth Brand Management & Reputation Awards

Best Wealth Management Firm of the Year at the International Elite 100 Award s

Best Global Wealth Advisory Firm - UK, in the UK Finance Awards 2022

2023

Gold in the Financial Advisory Firm of the Year category at the Magic Circle Awards

Overall Marketing Campaign category at the Citywealth Brand Management & Reputation Awards

Best Wealth Management Firm of the Year at the International Elite 100 Award s

Best Global Wealth Advisory Firm - UK, in the UK Finance Awards 2022

*The firm participates in industry award programmes relating to the provision of its investment services and in connection therewith the firm may be required to pay an administration fee for the submission of its application. Where such payments are made, they will be nominal in value and will not be in exchange for any form of guarantee or promise that the firm will receive the award for which it has applied. The firm only participates in award programmes where there is an independent panel of judges.
